identity.title: How would you like to continue?
identity.anonymousDesc: You can link an account later

digilocker.title: Verify with DigiLocker
digilocker.description: Verify your identity to get personalized updates

hero.lead: VoteUp shows you the election process unfolding live — and explains every stage through the lens of the democracy you already know. From Nigeria to Canada. From India to the UK. From anywhere, to everywhere.

guide.title: Election Guide
guide.description: Understand the process, timelines, and steps.

guide_page.title: Understanding the Indian Election Process
guide_page.description: India operates the world's largest democratic exercise. Explore the journey from a single vote to the formation of the national government.
guide_page.lifecycle_subtitle: Five critical steps that define the democratic transition.
guide_page.ready_description: Your voice matters. Track your constituency, verify your registration, and stay informed with VoteUp's interactive tools.

lok_sabha.title: Lok Sabha
lok_sabha.subtitle: The Lower House
lok_sabha.description: Directly elected by the people of India. It has 543 members representing specific geographical constituencies.

rajya_sabha.title: Rajya Sabha
rajya_sabha.subtitle: The Upper House
rajya_sabha.description: A permanent body representing States and Union Territories. Members are indirectly elected by State MLAs.

executive.title: The Executive
executive.subtitle: Prime Minister & Council
executive.description: The Prime Minister is appointed by the President and must command the confidence of the Lok Sabha majority.

registration.title: Voter Registration
registration.details: Citizens aged 18+ register via Form 6. The Electoral Roll is updated annually to ensure every eligible voice is counted.

schedule.title: Election Schedule
schedule.details: The Election Commission of India (ECI) announces dates for nominations, polling, and counting. Model Code of Conduct begins.

nominations.title: Candidate Nominations
nominations.details: Candidates file nominations with affidavits detailing assets and criminal records. Scrutiny and withdrawals follow.

polling.title: Polling Day
polling.details: Voters head to polling stations. Use of EVMs (Electronic Voting Machines) and VVPATs ensures transparency and speed.

counting.title: Counting & Declaration
counting.details: EVMs are opened in secure counting centers. Winners are declared constituency-wise, and the final tally shapes the government.

chatbot.title: VoteUp Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Namaste! I am your VoteUp Assistant. How can I help you understand the election process in India today?
chatbot.disclaimer: VoteUp AI can make mistakes. Verify with official sources.
